source_policy: fully authored Blender animatable static hero geometry; no Meshy chassis or turret imports; rejected boxmodel v1-13 remains red/no-op reference only
uv_policy: box and planar UV plates with broad paintable surfaces and decal-friendly material families; no packed atlas

orientation_contract.authored_axes: X forward/back, Y up/down, Z left/right
orientation_contract.threejs_axes_after_gltf: X forward/back, Y up/down, Z left/right
orientation_contract.visual_regression_prevented: static hero tank must be visually joined but not fused; turret, cannon, coaxial MG, tracks, and wheel groups remain separate animatable nodes

runtime_contract.cannon_elevation: rotate cannon_elevation_pivot for mantlet, barrel, and coaxial MG pitch
runtime_contract.coaxial_mg: coaxial_mg is parented to cannon_elevation_pivot and must move with barrel/mantlet
runtime_contract.tread_motion: scroll material maps or animate children of left_track_motion and right_track_motion
runtime_contract.wheel_motion: rotate children of left_roadwheel_group and right_roadwheel_group
runtime_contract.hull_track_relationship: integrated sponson walls, continuous fender lips, and track returns overlap enough to read as joined metal instead of holes or exterior blocker slabs

dalle_paintability.prompt_rule: Use surface id and broad weathered olive armor/tread language; add readable markings later through decals, not generated pseudo-text.

red_build_context.replaces: authored_sherman_boxmodel_v1 v1-13 visual no-op gap repair
red_build_context.forbidden_success_claim: node, token, or strip existence without visible cloud/Sense relationship change
